title: eryngium noeanum
intro: Eryngium noeanum, also known as Noan Eryngium or Noan Sea Holly, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eryngium noeanum include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
